currentFAQs.q: How much does attic insulation cost in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: Most homeowners in {{CITY}} pay between {{AVG_LOW}} and {{AVG_HIGH}} for attic insulation, depending on type and coverage area.

currentFAQs.q: Is spray foam insulation worth the extra cost?
currentFAQs.a: Spray foam provides the highest R-value per inch and also acts as an air barrier. Closed-cell foam is best for moisture-prone areas, while blown-in is often the most cost-effective for attic coverage.

currentFAQs.q: How much insulation do I need?
currentFAQs.a: The DOE recommends R-38 to R-60 for attics in most climate zones. An energy audit can determine the exact R-value target for your home in {{CITY_STATE}}.
